usernameRequired.title: Username Required
usernameRequired.subtitle: You need to set a username before you can sync your identity
usernameRequired.hint: You can use a-z, 0-9. Minimum length is 4 characters.
usernameRequired.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid username (4+ characters, a-z and 0-9 only)
usernameRequired.errorFormat: You can use a-z, 0-9. Minimum length is 4 characters.

recoveryPhrase.title: Save your recovery phrase
recoveryPhrase.subtitle: These 12 words are the ONLY way to restore your account if you lose this device. Write them down in order and keep them somewhere safe and offline.
recoveryPhrase.warningTitle: This is your only chance to save it
recoveryPhrase.warning: Oxy cannot recover your account for you. If you lose both this device and this phrase, your account is gone forever.
recoveryPhrase.copyWarning: Do not screenshot or store this phrase digitally. Write it down on paper.
recoveryPhrase.confirmCheckbox: I have written down my recovery phrase and stored it in a safe place. I understand Oxy cannot recover it for me.
recoveryPhrase.missingMessage: We could not show your recovery phrase. Please go back and create your identity again.
recoveryPhrase.backNavigationBlockedMessage: You must save your recovery phrase before continuing. If you leave now, you will lose access to your account.

identityExists.title: Identity already exists
identityExists.message: An Oxy identity already exists on this device. Continue with the existing identity or, if you have your previous recovery phrase saved, you can replace it.
identityExists.replaceWarning: This will permanently remove the existing identity from this device. Make sure you have its recovery phrase saved first.

usernameStep.title: Choose your username
usernameStep.subtitleOffline: You're offline. You can set your username later when online.
usernameStep.subtitle: Your username is required. You can change this later in settings.
usernameStep.hint: You can use a-z, 0-9. Minimum length is 4 characters.

importStep.title: Import Your Identity
importStep.subtitle: Enter your 12-word recovery phrase to restore your identity.

items.profile: Your Oxy profile and public identity
items.mailboxes: All email mailboxes, messages, and attachments

deleteAccount.failedDefault: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
deleteAccount.localKeyPurgeWarning: Your account was deleted, but the identity key could not be removed from this device. Reinstall the app to clear it fully.

payments.title: Payments & subscriptions
payments.subtitle: Manage your payment methods, subscriptions, and wallets.

wallet.subtitle: Your in-app wallet for Oxy services
wallet.oxyPaySubtitle: Balance: {{balance}} — Pay for subscriptions, services, and features
wallet.fairwalletSubtitle: Direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning

methods.cardEmpty: Secure card payments — No card on file
methods.oxyPaySubtitle: Balance: {{balance}} — Use your in-app wallet balance
methods.fairwalletSubtitle: Pay with FairCoin via QR code

expanded.cardBody: Secure card payments processed through Oxy services. Your card details are encrypted and handled by secure payment processors. Cards are charged when purchasing subscriptions or services.
expanded.oxyPayBody: Your in-app wallet uses FairCoin as the base currency. Use your balance to pay for subscriptions, premium features, and services within the Oxy ecosystem. Your current balance is displayed at the top of this screen.
expanded.fairwalletBody: FAIRWallet enables direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning. When making a payment, choose FAIRWallet as your payment method and scan the generated QR code with your FairCoin wallet app. Transactions use blockchain technology for transparency and security.

history.noBillingSubtitle: Your payments and invoices will appear here
history.noTransactionsSubtitle: Your wallet transactions will appear here

info.fairCoinBody: FairCoin is the base cryptocurrency used across all Oxy services. All transactions, including subscriptions, services, and in-app purchases, are denominated in FairCoin.
info.oxyPayBody: Oxy Pay is your in-app wallet that stores your FairCoin balance. Use it to pay for subscriptions, premium features, and services within the Oxy ecosystem. Your balance is displayed at the top of this screen.
info.fairwalletBody: FAIRWallet enables direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning. When making a payment, you can choose FAIRWallet as your payment method and scan the generated QR code with your FairCoin wallet app.
info.securityBody: All payments are processed securely through Oxy services. Your payment information is encrypted and never stored on your device. Credit card details are handled by secure payment processors, and cryptocurrency transactions use blockchain technology for transparency and security.
info.paymentMethodsBody: You can pay using Credit/Debit Cards, Oxy Pay wallet balance, or FAIRWallet. When purchasing subscriptions or services, the payment gateway will guide you through the process and allow you to choose your preferred payment method.

fairCoinBanner.title: FairCoin Wallet
fairCoinBanner.description: A self-custody cryptocurrency wallet for managing your FairCoin. You control your keys and funds independently from Oxy services.
fairCoinBanner.openMessage: Please visit https://fairco.in/wallet to learn more about FAIRWallet.

search.startSubtitle: Type in the search bar above to find screens and navigate to different sections of your account.

head.title: Commons by Oxy
head.description: Your Oxy identity vault — create and hold your keys on your device.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or restart the app.

a11y.logoHint: Tap to go home, double tap to scroll to top
a11y.openStoreHint: Opens the app store to install the FairCoin wallet

scanQr.identityRequiredBody:
To scan QR codes and authorize sign-in requests, you need to create or import an identity.

Identity creation is only available on native platforms (iOS/Android). Please use the mobile app to set up your identity.
scanQr.permissionBody: To scan QR codes for sign-in authorization, we need access to your camera.
scanQr.instructions: Scan the QR code shown in the app you want to sign in to
scanQr.invalidBody: This QR code is not a valid Oxy authorization request.

authorize.permissionsTitle: This app will be able to:
authorize.authorizedSuccess: Authorized {{app}} to access your Oxy identity.

errors.alreadyProcessed: This authorization request has already been processed or expired
errors.noSession: No active session. Please sign in first.

aboutIdentity.title: About Your Identity
aboutIdentity.subtitle: Self-custody identity powered by cryptography
aboutIdentity.importantNotice: Your recovery phrase is the ONLY way to restore your identity if you lose access to this device. Oxy cannot reset or recover your account. Keep your recovery phrase safe and never share it.
aboutIdentity.selfCustodyDescription: Unlike traditional accounts, your Oxy identity uses the same technology that secures Bitcoin. You have complete control over your identity.

items.privateKeySubtitle: Your private key is encrypted and stored securely on this device. It never leaves your device.
items.noPasswordSubtitle: You sign in using cryptographic proof, not passwords that can be guessed or stolen.
items.recoverySubtitle: Your 12-word recovery phrase is the only way to restore your identity on a new device.
items.decentralizedSubtitle: Your identity is not controlled by any company. You own it completely.

aboutIdentity.exportKeySubtitle: Print your private key for secure backup
aboutIdentity.accountSettingsDescription: Manage your account preferences and expiration settings.

expirationPicker.title: Account Expiration
expirationPicker.message: Choose when your account expires after inactivity

aboutIdentity.expirationUpdateFailed: Failed to update account expiration setting. Please try again.

securityWarning.title: Security Warning
securityWarning.message:
Exporting your private key will print it on paper. Anyone with access to this printed key can control your identity. Make sure you are in a secure location and will store the printed document safely.

Do you want to continue?

export.noPrivateKey: No private key found on this device
export.sentToPrinter: Private key has been sent to printer
export.failed: Failed to export private key. Please try again.

print.warningBody: This document contains your private key. Anyone with access to this key can control your identity. Store this document in a secure location, such as a safe or safety deposit box. Never share this key with anyone.
print.info1: This private key is used to sign transactions and prove your identity
print.info2: If you lose this key and your recovery phrase, you will permanently lose access to your identity
print.info3: Do not store this document digitally (screenshots, cloud storage, etc.)
print.info4: Consider storing multiple copies in different secure locations
print.info5: If this key is compromised, you should immediately create a new identity
print.footerLine2: This document was generated by the Oxy Accounts app

backup.missingSubtitle: We could not find a private key on this device. Backups encrypt the identity key stored locally, so you need to create or import your identity first.
backup.missingBanner: If you already have an identity on another device, sign in there and create the backup from that device.
backup.title: Create Encrypted Backup
backup.subtitle: Generate a password-protected backup file that you can store securely offline.
backup.banner: Store this file in a secure location (safe, encrypted drive, etc.). Never share your password or backup file.
backup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters long
errors.noPrivateKey: No private key found on this device
errors.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this platform

backup.shareSuccess: Backup file ready. Save it to a secure location like your password manager, encrypted drive, or offline storage.

readme.title: Oxy Identity Backup
readme.intro: This backup file contains your encrypted identity.
readme.restoreStep2: Use the Oxy Accounts app to import the wallet.json file
readme.restoreStep3: Enter your backup password when prompted
readme.important1: Store this file in a secure location (safe, encrypted drive, etc.)
readme.important2: Never share your password or backup file
readme.important3: Keep multiple copies in different secure locations
readme.important4: If this backup is compromised, create a new identity immediately

home.title: Your identity
home.subtitle: The keys to your Oxy identity live on this device.
home.yourIdentitySubtitle: You hold the private key. No one can lock you out.
home.accountSubtitle: Manage your profile, devices and privacy in the Accounts app.

actions.aboutIdentitySubtitle: Public key, self-custody details and export
actions.createBackupSubtitle: Save a recoverable copy of your keys

scan.title: Sign in to another device
scan.subtitle: Point your camera at the QR code shown on the other device or website.
scan.instructions: Scan the QR code to approve sign-in
scan.invalidBody: That QR code isn't a valid Oxy sign-in request.
scan.expiredBody: This sign-in request has expired. Ask for a new QR code.
scan.permissionBody: Allow camera access to scan sign-in QR codes.

approve.heading: Sign-in request
approve.scopesTitle: This app will be able to access
approve.approvedBody: You approved the sign-in. You can return to the other device.
approve.errorBody: This sign-in request is invalid, already used, or expired.
approve.biometricReason: Verify it is you to approve this sign-in
approve.biometricFailedBody: Approve with your device biometrics or passcode to continue.
approve.unverifiedBody: We couldn't confirm where this sign-in request started. Only approve if you JUST started it yourself on a device you trust. If you didn't, deny it.

hub.title: Citizen
hub.subtitle: Your verifiable Oxy identity — show it, prove it, carry it.
hub.identitySubtitle: Self-custody Oxy ID and the reputation you've earned.

actions.reputationSubtitle: How much you're trusted, and why
actions.openCitizenSubtitle: Your Oxy ID card, reputation and verification

id.qrPending: Finish setting up your account to generate your QR.
id.flipHint: Tap the card to flip it
id.pendingNote: This device holds your keys, but your account isn't registered with Oxy yet. Your card and QR work offline; we'll finish registration when you're back online.

nfc.active: NFC active — hold phones together to verify

card.title: Citizen card
card.verifiedDesc: Oxy signed this card and the signature checks out. The details below are authentic.
card.unverifiedDesc: This card could not be verified. Do not trust the details below.

error.title: Couldn't resolve card
error.body: We couldn't reach Oxy to verify this card, and nothing is cached for it yet.
error.invalidBody: This QR isn't a valid Oxy ID.

personhood.title: Proof of personhood
personhood.verifiedDesc: Oxy is confident you're a real, unique person. This protects your reputation and unlocks the highest trust across Oxy apps.
personhood.buildingDesc: You're still building proof that you're a real person. Reach the threshold by collecting the signals below.
personhood.penaltyNote: A sybil penalty is lowering your score. It eases as you gather genuine, independent signals over time.
personhood.footnote: Your score is recomputed from real, independent signals — vouches from trusted people, in-person confirmations, and biometric binding — minus any sybil penalty. No single signal can fake it.
personhood.settingsEntrySubtitle: Show you're a real person and see how to raise your score

signals.title: Your signals
signals.subtitle: The independent evidence behind your score.
signals.vouchesDesc: Trusted people who staked their reputation that you're real.
signals.realLifeDesc: People who confirmed they met you in person.
signals.biometricDesc: Your identity is bound to this device's biometrics.

improve.title: How to increase it
improve.subtitle: Stack genuine signals — each one is hard to fake.
improve.getVouchedDesc: Ask people who already trust you to vouch you're a real person.
improve.doRealLifeDesc: Show your Oxy ID in person so others can confirm they met you.
improve.bindBiometricDesc: Protect your identity with this device's Face ID, Touch ID or fingerprint.

error.title: Couldn't load your status
error.body: We couldn't reach Oxy, and nothing is cached yet.

reputation.title: Reputation
reputation.subtitle: Trust you've earned — weighted by how real it is.

attest.title: Get attested in real life
attest.desc: Meet someone in person and have them sign for your Oxy ID.

validate.title: Validate others
validate.desc: Review validation requests as a trusted juror.

personhood.title: Prove your personhood
personhood.desc: Stack signals that you're a real, unique person.

reputation.bySourceSubtitle: Where your reputation comes from, strongest first.
reputation.footnote: Real-life verification counts most, peer/civic validation next, and app activity least. Penalties are subtracted.

error.title: Couldn't load reputation
error.body: We couldn't reach Oxy, and nothing is cached yet.

sources.realLifeDesc: Verified in person — someone scanned your Oxy ID and signed for it.
sources.peerCivicDesc: Validated by a random jury of trusted citizens.
sources.appsDesc: Earned through your activity inside Oxy apps.
sources.penaltiesDesc: Points subtracted for violations and reversals.

standing.verifiedMax: Verified human — the highest standing on Oxy.
standing.restricted: Standing restricted — resolve outstanding issues to recover.

progress.label: {{current}} → {{target}} · {{remaining}} to {{tier}}
progress.topTier: You're at the highest earned tier. Verify your personhood to reach the top.

stats.influenceCaption: How much your actions count across Oxy — capped so no one can dominate.
stats.reliabilityCaption: How often your reports and judgments hold up.

composition.empty: No reputation earned yet — your verified actions will build it.
composition.hint: Tap a segment to see its share

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.empty: No reputation activity yet — your verified actions will appear here.

section.title: Real-life confirmation
section.subtitle: The strongest reputation comes from people who met you in person.
section.actionSubtitle: Show a QR for someone to confirm in person

request.title: Confirm you met me
request.subtitle: Have the other person scan this in their Oxy app to confirm they met you in real life.
request.buildError: Couldn't generate your code. Try again.
request.hint: The code only carries your ID and a one-time token — they re-sign it and Oxy verifies it.

done.title: Confirmed
done.body: You confirmed meeting {{name}}. They earned {{points}} reputation.

error.expired: This confirmation code has expired. Ask them to generate a new one.
error.nonce_used: This code was already used. Ask them to generate a new one.
error.pair_cooldown: You've already confirmed this person recently. Try again later.
error.excluded_graph_neighbor: You're too closely connected to confirm this person.
error.excluded_shared_device: This phone is tied to their account, so it can't confirm them.
error.self_attestation: You can't confirm your own identity. Sign in with a different account to confirm someone else.
error.bad_signature: Your identity key couldn't be verified. Open Commons and finish setting up your identity, then try again.
error.subject_not_found: We couldn't find that person's identity.
error.generic: We couldn't record this confirmation. Please try again.

inbox.title: Validation requests
inbox.subtitle: You were randomly selected to help judge these.

error.title: Couldn't load requests
error.body: We couldn't reach Oxy, and nothing is cached yet.

empty.title: Nothing to judge
empty.body: When you're selected for a jury, requests will show up here.

vote.title: Cast your verdict
vote.biometricReason: Verify it's you to sign your verdict
vote.prompt: Review the request and decide whether it's valid.
vote.biometricFailed: Confirm with your device biometrics or passcode to vote.

done.title: Verdict recorded
done.body: Thanks for doing your civic duty.

gone.title: No longer available
gone.body: This request was already resolved or you've already voted.

error.already_voted: You've already voted on this request.
error.not_selected: You're not on this validation jury.
error.generic: We couldn't submit your verdict. Please try again.

confirm.title: Vouch for this person
confirm.biometricReason: Verify it's you to sign your vouch
confirm.invalidBody: This isn't a valid Oxy ID to vouch for.
confirm.intro: You're vouching that {{name}} is a real, unique person you personally know and trust.
confirm.stakeHint: Stake reputation to back your vouch. A bigger stake counts for more — and risks more if you're wrong.
confirm.slashWarning: Vouching puts your reputation on the line. If this person turns out not to be real, your vouch can be slashed and you'll lose the stake. Only vouch for people you truly know.
confirm.biometricFailed: Confirm with your device biometrics or passcode to vouch.

done.title: Vouch recorded
done.body: You vouched for {{name}}. They earned {{points}} toward proof of personhood.

error.already_vouched: You've already vouched for this person.
error.voucher_below_threshold: Your own trust isn't high enough to vouch yet. Build more reputation first.
error.excluded_graph_neighbor: You're too closely connected to vouch for this person.
error.excluded_shared_device: This account shares a device with yours, so you can't vouch for it.
error.subject_not_found: We couldn't find this person's account.
error.generic: We couldn't record your vouch. Please try again.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.subtitle: Verifiable claims that people and organizations have signed about you.

empty.title: No credentials yet
empty.body: When an issuer signs a verifiable claim about you, it shows up here.

error.title: Couldn't load credentials
error.body: We couldn't reach Oxy, and nothing is cached yet.

detail.title: Credential
detail.noClaims: This credential carries no readable claims.
detail.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this credential. It may have been removed.

verify.validBody: The issuer's signature checks out and this credential is live.
verify.errorBody: We couldn't reach Oxy to verify this credential. Try again.

reason.bad_signature: The signature doesn't match. This credential may have been tampered with.
reason.issuer_key_not_current: The issuer signed this with a key they have since rotated away.
reason.issuer_not_found: We couldn't find the issuer's identity.
reason.record_missing: The signed record for this credential is missing.
reason.not_found: No credential exists for this record.
reason.generic: This credential could not be verified.

revoke.biometricReason: Verify it's you to revoke this credential
revoke.biometricFailed: Confirm with your device biometrics or passcode to revoke.
revoke.confirmBody: It will be marked revoked and stop verifying. This can't be undone.
revoke.doneBody: This credential is now revoked and no longer verifies.

error.not_issuer: Only the issuer can revoke this credential.
error.generic: We couldn't revoke this credential. Please try again.

issue.title: Issue a credential
issue.invalidBody: This isn't a valid Oxy ID to issue a credential to.
issue.intro: You're signing a verifiable claim about {{name}}.
issue.typeHint: What kind of claim are you making?
issue.statementHint: Describe exactly what you're attesting about this person.
issue.statementPlaceholder: e.g. Worked as a software engineer from 2020 to 2024.
issue.expiryHint: Leave blank for a credential that never expires.
issue.expiryInvalid: Enter a future date as YYYY-MM-DD, or leave it blank.
issue.attribution: You are signing this claim about {{name}} with your key; it's publicly verifiable and attributed to you.
issue.biometricReason: Verify it's you to sign this credential
issue.biometricFailed: Confirm with your device biometrics or passcode to sign.

done.title: Credential issued
done.body: You signed a {{type}} credential for {{name}}. They can show it and anyone can verify it.

error.title: Couldn't issue
error.self_credential: You can't issue a credential about yourself.
error.holder_not_found: We couldn't find this person's account.
error.invalid_holder: This isn't a valid person to issue a credential to.
error.invalid_expiry: The expiry date must be a valid date in the future.
error.invalid_claims: Add a clear claim and a credential type, then try again.
error.conflict: Something changed while signing. Please try again.
error.generic: We couldn't issue this credential. Please try again.

nodes.title: Your data node
nodes.settingsEntrySubtitle: Where your signed identity and records live

error.title: Couldn't load your node
error.body: We couldn't reach Oxy to check your data node. Check your connection and try again.

intro.title: Own your data
intro.body: Your signed identity, profile, and records live on a node YOU control. Oxy keeps a fast, verified copy — reads are always instant, but your node is the source of truth.

how.title: How it works
how.sourceOfTruthDesc: Your signed records live on your node — nobody can change them but you.
how.fastCopyDesc: So reads across Oxy apps stay instant, even when your node is asleep.
how.portableDesc: Disconnect or move to your own node — your data goes with you.

choose.title: Set up your node
choose.subtitle: Most people pick a managed vault. You can switch to your own node later.

managed.ctaSubtitle: Oxy runs a secure node for you. Recommended.
managed.note: A managed vault is the easy path — Oxy operates the node, you keep full control of your keys, and you can move to your own node anytime.

selfHost.ctaSubtitle: Advanced — point Oxy at a node you run.
selfHost.webUnavailable: Connecting your own node needs the Oxy mobile app — it has to sign with the identity key stored on your device. On the web, use "Create a managed vault" to set up a node now; you can switch to your own node from the app later.

form.title: Connect your node
form.subtitle: Enter your node's address and the public key it signs records with.
form.endpointHint: Must be a public HTTPS address.
form.publicKeyHint: The secp256k1 key your node signs with (hex).
form.publicKeyInvalid: Enter the node's public key in hex.
form.modePullDesc: Your node fetches updates from Oxy on its own schedule.
form.modePushDesc: Oxy pushes updates to your node as they happen.
form.biometricFailed: Confirmation failed. Your node was not connected.

provision.biometricReason: Confirm to create your managed vault
provision.biometricFailed: Confirmation failed. Your vault was not created.

done.title: Your vault is ready
done.body: Oxy is now operating your data node. Your identity and records are yours — verified and portable.

done.title: Your node is connected
done.body: Oxy will keep a verified copy in sync with your node from now on.

type.managedDesc: Operated by Oxy on your behalf

nodes.unreachableNote: Oxy couldn't reach your node on the last check: {{reason}}
nodes.unreachableNoteGeneric: Oxy couldn't reach your node on the last check. Your last known data is still served.
nodes.revokedNote: This node is disconnected. Create a managed vault or connect a node to make your records portable again.

actions.title: Actions
actions.syncDesc: Ask Oxy to pull the latest records from your node.
actions.syncFailed: Couldn't request a sync. Try again.
actions.disconnectDesc: Stop syncing and remove this node from your identity.

disconnect.confirmBody: Oxy will stop syncing with it and remove it from your identity. Your existing data stays, but it's no longer backed by your node.
disconnect.biometricFailed: Confirmation failed. Your node was not disconnected.

errors.not_authenticated: You need to be signed in to manage your node.
errors.managed_unavailable: Managed vaults aren't available right now. Please try again later.
errors.invalid_endpoint: Oxy couldn't use that node address. Check the URL is a public HTTPS endpoint and try again.
errors.user_not_found: We couldn't find your account. Please sign in again.
errors.generic: We couldn't complete that. Check your connection and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your identity, backups and account.

recovery.restoredBody: You're all set — taking you back in.
recovery.failedBody: Your identity ({{key}}) is protected on this device but couldn't be read from a backup. Enter your recovery phrase to restore it, or start over.
recovery.lockedBody: Your identity is safe, but the secure store couldn't be read right now. Please try again.
recovery.startOverConfirmBody: This permanently erases the protected identity on this device. Without your 12-word recovery phrase, your account will be unrecoverable.
